Text: ANDREJ KARPATHY JUST DESCRIBED THE EXACT SYSTEM THIS SILICON VALLEY PROFESSOR HAS ALREADY BEEN BUILDING FOR CLIENTS

Karpathy coined vibe coding - and just laid out a second brain pattern where documents go into an AI that builds a structured wiki that grows over time.

Not RAG - RAG rediscovers the same info with every query - this system compounds and gets smarter with every new document.

You drop any file in - and a dedicated librarian agent structures it and adds it to the knowledge vault automatically - zero manual work.

The entire base then shows up as a 3D mind graph where every node is a concept and every connection shows how things relate.

Karpathy described the theory - this is the production version.
